CustomField.description: Is the objective of the proposed event strictly to provide scientific, educational, and professional content directly related to the Company’s therapeutic areas (e.g., no entertainment)? • Attach an agenda, if available. • If yes, what product/therapeutic area will be discussed? Describe below:"
CustomField.inlineHelpText: 2. Is the objective of the proposed event strictly to provide scientific, educational, and professional content directly related to the Company’s therapeutic areas (e.g., no entertainment)?
CustomField.label: Is the content in Therapeutic Areas
